nasb.text: An excellent wife is the crown of her husband, But she who shames him is like rottenness in his bones.

esv.text: An excellent wife is the crown of her husband, but she who brings shame is like rottenness in his bones.

cnv.text: 有才德的妻子是丈夫的冠冕， 貽羞的婦人，如同丈夫骨中的朽爛。

ccb.text: 贤德的妻子是丈夫的冠冕， 无耻的妻子如丈夫的骨瘤。

csbs.text: 才德的妻子，是丈夫的冠冕； 带来羞耻的妻子，如同丈夫骨中的朽烂。
